name: Visual Cortex
description: Primary visual systems transform raw light and motion cues into meaningful patterns.
scientificNote: Visual processing is distributed across multiple cortical areas (V1 through higher-order pathways), not a single visual switch.

name: Amygdala
description: Threat salience is amplified rapidly before deliberate interpretation catches up.
scientificNote: Amygdala responses depend on network context and prior learning; threat detection is not isolated to one region.

name: Hippocampus
displayName: Memory Is an Edit, Not a Recording
description: Recent fragments are linked with stored context to reconstruct what happened.
scientificNote: Memory retrieval is reconstructive and involves hippocampal-cortical interactions across distributed systems.

name: Default Mode Network
displayName: When the World Goes Quiet, Narrative Wakes Up
description: Self-related thoughts and spontaneous simulation rise when external demand drops.
scientificNote: The DMN is a large-scale network pattern, not a single anatomical node.
